texto: Bad and cruel as our people were treated by the whites, not one of themwas hurt or molested by our band. (...) The whites were complaining at the same time that we were intruding upontheir rights. They made it appear that they were the injured party, andwe the intruders. They called loudly to the great war chief to protecttheir property.How smooth must be the language of the whites, when they can make rightlook like wrong, and wrong like right.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Black Hawk: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Bad and cruel as our people were treated by the whites, not one of themwas hurt or molested by ou…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, language, morality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de morality e native-american.
